title: potentilla canescens subvar. pycnotricha
intro: Potentilla canescens subvar. pycnotricha, also known as Pycnotricha cinquefoil, is a lesser-known variety of the Potentilla canescens plant, which is a perennial shrub native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pycnotricha cinquefoil include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its roots and leaves can be used in herbal preparations to promote overall well-being.
